scripts.install-all: cd services/kafka && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../email-service && npm install && cd ../analytic-service && npm install && cd ../product-service && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "PAYMENT,ORDER,EMAIL,ANALYTICS,PRODUCT,CLIENT" -c "bgBlue,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgRed" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:email" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:all: npm run kafka:up && sleep 5 && npm run dev
scripts.stop: npm run kafka:down && pkill -f 'node index.js' && pkill -f 'next dev'
